docket_entries.description: NOT REPORTED. INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-21-2025, IN DEPT. 304, IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR PENDING COORDINATION WITH JCCP 5188 OR NOTICE FROM COUNSEL THAT THIS CASE WILL NOT BE COORDINATED WITH JCCP 5188. (D304)

NOT REPORTED. THE APPLICATION FOR COMPLEX DESIGNATION IS APPROVED. AN ORDER GRANTING COMPLEX DESIGNATION AND FOR SINGLE ASSIGNMENT TO JUDGE ETHAN P. SCHULMAN FOR ALL PURPOSES IS ISSUED. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR OCT-21-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 304. THE DEC-31-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPARTMENT 610 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (D304)
